string.text:
A compact personal defence weapon, designed as a close-combat weapon for special forces and law enforcement teams. This special "Operator" variant has been modified with a Barska Electrosight, laser designator and tactical flashlight.
 
 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES: 
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Faction type: %c[ui_gray_2]Warsaw Pact
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]KBP Instrument Design Bureau
